{{CargoOrgan
|name=Da Vinci Mech Arm
|type=Common
|rank=red
|id=10937
|idx=138
|description="...Ninety percent of the test subjects experienced phantom limb pain, which stabilized after taking inhibitors. One percent of the test subjects showed symptoms of prosthetic control loss..."
— "Cyborg Experiment Log"
|skill=
|hp=2530
|def=279
|atk=330
|rush=208
|gene1=Wind DMG +2%
|gene2=Lifesteal Effect +20%
|gene3=Lifesteal deals +20% Lifesteal DMG
|gene4=Restore 800 HP each round
|gene5=Healing +12%
|gene6=CRIT DMG REDUC +10%
|gene7=Lifesteal deals +40% Lifesteal DMG (Awakened)
|}}
